title: DOWN PAYMENT ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: DEVNW CORVALLIS DOWN PAYMENT ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a combination of education, counseling, and down payment financial assistance for income-qualified first-time homebuyers to cover a portion of the down payment and/or closing costs associated with the purchase of a home (when funding is available). 2525 SE Third Street Corvallis, OR 97333 Eligibility: -Low to moderate income households -Be a first time homebuyer; cannot have owned a home in the past three years -Purchase a single-family home, including a detached home, a condo, or a manufactured home on owned land -Occupy the home -Additional loan requirements may apply Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-6pm Email (541) 752-7220 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 752-7220 Main phone Corvallis (541) 752-5037 FAX Main phone (541) 752-7220 Corvallis Alternate (541) 345-7106 ext 2053 Assistant Director Luis Mendoza [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Annual membership is $75 which includes access to counseling, classes, and workshops, and Down Payment Assistance program. DOCUMENTS: Application LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Benton, Lincoln, and Linn Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8am-6pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on the second floor at the corner of 3rd Street and SW Madison Avenue. Services: Home Purchase/Construction Financing/Refinancing Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - COMMUNITY LENDINGWORKS COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - INDIVIDUAL DEVELOPMENT ACCOUNTS HOUSING/SHELTER - AFFORDABLE RENTALS HOUSING/SHELTER - LINN-BENTON-LINCOLN COUNTY HOME REPAIR PROGRAM MONEY MANAGEMENT - FINANCIAL WELLBEING SERVICES MONEY MANAGEMENT - FORECLOSURE AVOIDANCE AND EVICTION PREVENTION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. DEVNW CORVALLIS
